requests.prompt: Full-scene first frame, not a product-only packshot. Use reference image 1 as the real product identity lock; preserve the Master Kong Iced Black Tea bottle’s shape, colors, material, packaging, labels, and visible marks. Place the real bottle upright, plausible scale, on a clean light-wood tabletop. Background: plain beige wall to all canvas edges with a gentle warm sunlit patch. Lighting: warm, golden, slightly amber. Minimal setup only—tabletop, beige wall, bottle; no other props. No hand or person visible. Edge-to-edge physical scene; no inner frame, border, poster, inset, or pasted image; no black/white margins or central vertical rectangle. No captions, UI, watermarks, or extra logos. Product clearly visible.
requests.negative_prompt: No captions, subtitles, watermark, UI, fake logo, random letters, extra fingers, warped hands, blurry product, wrong product, product-only packshot, empty background, inner frame, border, poster, inset image, image inside an image, black margins, dark outer margins, central vertical rectangle, photo within a photo, matted print.
